bytecode_budget_groups.description: Core burn authorization, retained burn facts, and burn audit events
Core collection facts, lifecycle transitions, freeze, and supply limits
ERC-165 discovery for every standard interface advertised by Core
ERC-721 name, symbol, and token URI delegation
Contract-wide ERC-721 ownership, approvals, transfers, and standard events
ERC-7572 contractURI read, restricted emitContractURIUpdated helper, and standard update event
Restricted ERC-4906 and Stream-native metadata refresh emission
Manager-only mint preparation, completion, rollback, and token data
Generic cached satellite discovery, replacement, and one-way freeze
Sequential allocation, retained identity, lifecycle, and supply facts

Emitted by restricted single-token or batch metadata refresh helpers after validation
Emitted by every authoritative Core burn
Emitted at every authoritative token-identity allocation
Emitted only by prepared-mint incident abort
Emitted by ERC-721 ownership transitions
